Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}The time to part has finally come.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Though this is our last day together, we want the third-year class to know that we're truly proud of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We wish each of you good health, happiness, and success.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}On this momentous occasion, I bid you all a fond farewell on behalf of the student body.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}This past year, I accepted an important responsibility as student council president.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}When I first addressed you from this podium...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I spoke to you all about seizing opportunity while you had the chance...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It must have been fate that intervened and gave me an important reminder of this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}As many of you know, my father unexpectedly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}He unexpectedly passed away, due to sudden illness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Wow, that's rare. I've never heard her stumble in a speech before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It's a big day... It must be tough to talk about her father.[n]{f 1 1}
